meta.reasoning: Jack-Ten suited is a strong hand with flush and straight potential. Raising 3x BB as the last pre-flop actor to build the pot and apply pressure.
7s-5c offsuit is a weak hand. Facing a 3x BB raise from s4, calling 60 chips is not justified with these hole cards even from the button position.

meta.reasoning_summary: Holding 2h/8s (2-8 offsuit) — very weak hand as small blind facing a raise to 60. Folding is correct here.

meta.reasoning: Qc Td on a 2c Jh 5s 9s board with no pair and only a gutshot draw (needs 8). Facing a 60-chip raise into a 140-chip pot, pot odds (~30% equity needed) do not justify calling with ~9% outs. Folding preserves chip lead.

result.summary: s4 wins by chip lead after 30 hands (s4: 2550, s2: 1450). Biggest pot: 2750. Showdowns: 10.
